action.reasoning: Observation: Iter 11 eval failed because predict.py attempted to download resnet50 weights in the offline eval environment. Remaining time only 0.2h, no eval yet, score will be zero. Analysis: The best checkpoint from iter 10 (val mIoU 0.2730, DeepLabV3 ResNet50) is available. Predict.py must instantiate model without pretrained weights to avoid network access, then load full state_dict from checkpoint. Also ensure environment variables prevent any unintended downloads. Decision: Rewrite predict.py with pretrained=False, load checkpoint state_dict, use DataParallel for multi-GPU inference, and submit eval immediately. No training needed.
